title: How hats
body:
**DISCLAIMER**: This mod will have a hiatus on development for a bit while I switch between mcreator to java. The mod will most likely go through _rework_ or maybe be _discontinued_.



**Overveiw**:
A hat mod made for me and my friends minecraft server. Comes with 9 Hats Currently and Planning On Adding More! These hats were modeled in blockbench and brought into the game using mcreator. The Mod is currently for forge 1.19.2 and I might update the version later on but will probably not make a fabric port or any other port. It also adds a wip block which is a blue lobster mug that might hopefully be working in a later version.

**Example Video** of hats being showcased:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/P80uAuyJQ6M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Mod Compatibility**:
No Known compatibility issues so far...

**FAQ**:

Q: How Do I equip a hat?
A: Right click it while holding it. If you are wearing a helmet or another hat it will drop on the ground.

Q: What will change in later updates?
A: Probably crafting recipes and of course some new hats.

Q: What makes this different from other hat mods?
A: This mod is simple. you craft the hat, no fancy gui and then you can use it to show of to your friends. No rarity system or anything like that.
